creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
id(1) synopsys says:

	id [user] id -G [-n] [user] id -g [-nr] [user] id -p id -u [-nr] [user]

	rather than 
	id [user]
	id -G [-n] [user]
	id -g [-nr] [user]
	id -p id -u [-nr] [user]

	to match the usage() statement.

Fix: 

don't konw mandoc well enough to do it myself.
How-To-Repeat: 	
	ssh freefall
	man id
